actual_work_performed: Created one prompt-only identity anchoring profile while keeping seed, control image, ControlNet strength, and ControlNet end percent unchanged.
Packaged the profile through New-WorkflowRunPackage.ps1 with static validation passing at zero defects.
Executed one bounded local ComfyUI sample and pulled back generated portrait plus diagnostic control-map outputs.
Performed strict whole-image visual QA against the retained seed 711570106 candidate.
Created a side-by-side comparison artifact and skipped the planned robustness rerun because the retained-seed gate failed.
rejection_reason: The anchor preserved broad subject category but changed the retained face and introduced facial hair, so it was not identity-preserving enough to justify a robustness seed rerun.
next_action: Do not promote this prompt-only identity anchor. If continuing MOD-17 Canny locally, try a lighter anti-drift prompt or reference-based identity strategy before another seed sweep.
